details.description: Main before the generic onboarding addition

change_summary.expected_result: A new project can copy a provider-neutral fail-closed adapter template, follow a concise onboarding guide, and validate the contract before implementing external writes.
functions: Validate template structure and default failure behavior
limitations: The template intentionally does not implement project-specific deployment or acceptance behavior.
change_summary.reason: Make the generic lightweight release-governance method reusable by projects other than the current adapter implementation.
change_summary.risk: Repository documentation, Skill resources, and tests only; no production preflight, deployment, service restart, or runtime write.

validation_plan.expected: Configuration, shell syntax, both Skills, and all 18 governance tests pass.
A source-revision package and manifest include the onboarding guide, template, tests, and generic governance files.
